title: Fix deep shift pattern performance (#6379)
body:
This pattern used to create 3 operations from 2. This might have been beneficial for expanded wide expressions if the shift was over VL_EDATA_SIZE, but V3Subst will delete word assignments on the input in that case. The real problem is this pattern will turn an And/Or/Xor tree with N leaves (so between log(N) to N nodes + 1 Shift) into the same log(N) to N nodes + N shifts, and on some RTLMeter designs this blows up compile time and memory while having no real performance benefit.

This also seems to be the cause of the slowdown observed in #6379
